chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD CP. No. D- 3080 of 2016 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 11.01.2018 For orders on office objection For katcha peshi For hearing of MA 16536/16 Mr. Aslam Baig Leghari, advocate for petitioner Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl.A.G. Learned counsel for the petitioner under the instructions of petitioner does not press this petition which is accordingly disposed of as withdrawn along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE
